description: Baseline: 7 heuristics from route.md Step 4a. Coverage: 16% (8/50). Fallback rate: 84%.
Unbound variable: complexity was empty for some beads, causing -le comparison to fail. Added numeric guards.

Added 9 new heuristics (8-16): bug→work, task+C≤3→work, decision→sprint, epic-no-children→sprint, research-keywords→sprint, C2→work, C4→sprint, brainstorm-no-plan→sprint, feature+C3→sprint. Plus numeric guards for empty complexity/child_count. Coverage: 16% → 100%. Fallback: 84% → 0%.

Baseline measurement only — no code changes. Result: fallback_rate=0%, heuristic_coverage=100% across 50 closed beads. All beads routed by existing 16 heuristics. Campaign target already at floor; no optimization possible on current dataset.

name: route-heuristic-coverage
summary: Reduced fallback_rate from 84% to 0% (100% heuristic coverage). 16 rules cover all 50 closed beads. 3 experiments total (1 crash, 2 kept, 1 confirmation discard).
